title: The use of accounting data to enable strategic decision-making
summary: 9609 A Level — linking accounts to corporate and functional strategy.
learningObjectives: Explain role of accounting in strategy.
Use financial data for strategic choices.

simpleExplanation.title: Numbers guide strategy
simpleExplanation.summary: Accounting data informs expansion, divestment, pricing, and financing decisions at board level.
steps: Historic data may lag market change.

sections.content: **Accounting for strategy** (10.4.1) links **6.2 planning** to **10.2 ratios**.
